headlines: Ethereum Foundation nears 70,000 ETH treasury staking goal
Huge Solana DeFi exploit drains roughly $280M from Drift
Morgan Stanley moves closer to low-fee spot Bitcoin ETF (MSBT)
Citadel-backed EDX Markets applies for US bank/trust charter

Tether presses investors on $500B valuation fundraise deadline','KuCoin settles with the CFTC for $500,000 over unregistered derivatives trading','U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs post first monthly inflow in March 2026 ($1.3B)','Google paper warns crypto industry about nearer-term quantum threat

articles.title: Ethereum Foundation nears 70,000 ETH treasury staking goal
articles.summary: The Ethereum Foundation completed a large deposit (≈45,034 ETH) to its staking program, bringing its active stake close to the stated 70,000 ETH target. The move shifts the foundation’s treasury strategy toward earning staking yield rather than selling ETH, supporting network security and supply dynamics.

articles.title: Huge Solana DeFi exploit drains roughly $280M from Drift
articles.summary: Drift, a Solana-based derivatives DeFi protocol, was hit by a sophisticated attack that drained about $280–$285 million. The exploit highlights ongoing smart-contract and platform risks on high-throughput chains and has triggered rapid asset freezes and forensic work.

articles.title: Morgan Stanley moves closer to low-fee spot Bitcoin ETF (MSBT)
articles.summary: Morgan Stanley filed an updated S-1 amendment for a spot Bitcoin trust (ticker MSBT), naming custodians and showing a very low management fee (reported ~0.14%), signalling an imminent launch that would intensify ETF fee competition.

articles.title: Citadel-backed EDX Markets applies for US bank/trust charter
articles.summary: EDX Markets, a trading venue backed by Citadel Securities and other institutional partners, has applied for a national trust/bank charter — a step that would widen access to banking services for crypto platforms and could reshape custody and settlement infrastructure.

articles.title: Tether presses investors on $500B valuation fundraise deadline
articles.summary: Reports say Tether is pushing a private fundraising sprint tied to a lofty $500 billion implied valuation and has set a short deadline for investor commitments — and may scale or delay the raise if demand is weak. The move has reignited debate over stablecoin business models and valuations.

articles.title: KuCoin settles with the CFTC for $500,000 over unregistered derivatives trading
articles.summary: Crypto exchange KuCoin (Peken Global Ltd.) agreed to pay $500,000 to settle CFTC claims it ran an unregistered offshore derivatives platform accessible to U.S. customers. The settlement requires limits on U.S. access and underscores continued U.S. enforcement focus on offshore platforms.

articles.title: U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs post first monthly inflow in March 2026 ($1.3B)
articles.summary: After several months of outflows, U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded roughly $1.3 billion of net inflows in March 2026 — a sign institutional demand may be returning and an important driver for short-term BTC market structure.

articles.title: Google paper warns crypto industry about nearer-term quantum threat
articles.summary: New research from Google researchers suggests progress in quantum algorithms could lower the resources needed to threaten widely used cryptography, renewing urgency for crypto projects to plan 'quantum-resistant' upgrades — especially for long-held, inactive keys.
